summary: A pilot from the 77 EFS reported a night-time DCA mission on 10/27/20 in which a radar and targeting pod contact showed two IR-significant objects, one circling the other, that vanished within a fraction of a second. The observer described red blinking strobes and received noise jamming, with the contacts moving at reported speed/direction of 060/20 and unable to be approached closer than 16.9 nautical miles.
